title: Breaking: Heatwave Scorches Odisha, Roads Empty After 11 AM - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
Severe heatwave grips Odisha, making life unbearable!
From extreme heat in western districts to intense humidity along the coast, the situation is turning critical.
Western Odisha is witnessing scorching temperatures, while coastal regions are struggling with high humidity levels, creating severe discomfort. The heat has become so intense that roads and marketplaces are turning deserted after 11 AM.
People are staying indoors to avoid heatstroke and dehydration, while authorities continue to monitor the situation closely. Experts warn that prolonged exposure could pose serious health risks, especially for the elderly and children.
The heatwave conditions are expected to continue, raising concerns across the state. Stay safe, stay hydrated, and avoid unnecessary travel during peak hours.

title: ଦିନରେ ତତାଇବ, ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟାରେ ଭିଜାଇବ | Heatwave, Humidity Grips Odisha| IMD Issues Thunderstorm, Rain Alert - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
Odisha is currently experiencing extreme weather conditions with a mix of intense heat, high humidity, and sudden thunderstorms.
While western Odisha is reeling under scorching heat, coastal regions are facing unbearable humidity, making daily life difficult for people. The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a warning about possible thunderstorms and Kalbaisakhi activity in several parts of the state.
Strong winds, lightning, and thundershowers are expected in many districts during the afternoon and evening hours. The weather is likely to remain unstable over the next few days.
The IMD has also warned that coastal and northern Odisha may continue to experience humid conditions along with isolated thunderstorm activity for the next 7 days.
